implementation_evidence.title: refactor: consolidate SW-003 receipt validation helpers
implementation_evidence.self_review: PASS: refactor-only change; shared helpers preserve digest binding, source receipt digest checks, live-apply blocking, and local-only boundaries; no Miro access, no provider mutation, no Issue #8 closure, no live apply readiness.

metadata.outcome: SW-003 live-gate receipt validation now uses shared helper checks for object/schema, digest binding, source digests, live-apply blockade, and boundaries without weakening existing tests.

title: Consolidate receipt validation helpers
goal: Reduce duplicated SW-003 receipt validation code by introducing shared helper checks for digest binding, source receipt digests, live-apply blockade and local-only boundaries.

acceptance.assertion: Common validation helpers cover repeated digest and boundary checks without weakening existing tests.
Existing evaluation/status/review packet negative tests still pass.
Refactor does not add live Miro access or live apply readiness.
